description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Cloudflare Queues API enables developers to create and manage message queues that integrate with Cloudflare Workers. Queues support guaranteed delivery, work offloading from requests, worker-to-worker communication, and data buffering and batching. The API provides endpoints for queue management, consumer configuration, message operations, and purging.
